gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 approved with no blocking findings and confirmed the helper preserves request validation while matching planner behavior for the default document chunk.
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_planner_materializer.py tests/test_workflow.py tests/test_project_governance.py -q -> 95 passed
what_changed: Added `DocumentKVRequest.for_text_document(...)` for the common single-text serving request path.
Updated the README Workflow API example to pair `SourceDocument.from_text(...)` with the new request helper.
Added request, workflow, and README governance coverage for the helper.
why: Cachet should make the simplest arbitrary-text workflow ergonomic end to end: source text construction, cache generation, request creation, and materialization should not require users to hand-write chunk maps.
